# detectHotspots

> Find performance hotspots in profile data

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| db | Database | yes |
| profileSessionId | string | yes |
| threshold | float | yes |

```mermaid
graph TD

  C --> D[result: return]
```
